overall.description: Third-person gameplay from Death Stranding showing the protagonist walking along a desolate black volcanic beach in rainy, overcast weather. The character navigates through an eerie landscape with floating supernatural entities (BTs) visible in the sky and bioluminescent plants dotting the ground, eventually turning inland to navigate around large rock formations.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dark shoreline with the ocean visible to the right and a large rock formation ahead

entered.detail: dark pebbly beach stretching along the coastline
calm dark ocean extending to the horizon
large mountain peak visible in the distant mist
large dark rock formation jutting from the shoreline
supernatural floating entities suspended in the sky connected by strands

segments.scene_description: The protagonist walks along a desolate black volcanic beach with dark pebbles underfoot. The ocean stretches to the right while a snow-capped mountain looms in the misty distance. Floating BT entities hover in the sky, and a large rock outcropping is visible ahead on the right.

events.description: screen fades from black revealing new terrain with scattered bioluminescent orange flowers

agents.ego_description: continuing through the rocky terrain with glowing orange bioluminescent plants scattered across the ground

entered.detail: small glowing orange flowers dotting the black volcanic ground

segments.scene_description: Following a brief fade to black, the scene reveals a similar volcanic landscape now dotted with small bioluminescent orange flowers. The character continues walking forward with the ocean still to the right and floating BTs visible in the overcast sky. The large rock formation from before has been left behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: rugged volcanic rock field with large boulders

events.description: character turns left and begins navigating around large rock formations

agents.ego_description: turning left and weaving between large black boulders, moving away from the shoreline

entered.detail: massive dark volcanic rock piles blocking the path

segments.scene_description: The character turns left away from the shoreline to navigate through a field of large black volcanic boulders. The ocean disappears from view as the camera turns, and the snow-capped mountain shifts to the left side of the frame. The terrain becomes more rugged and uneven as the character weaves between the rocks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a desolate volcanic coastline that leads toward a looming mountain peak. It begins with the protagonist walking across a beach of dark pebbles, with the vast ocean stretching out to the right. As the character advances, the camera captures floating BT entities hovering in the overcast sky while a snow-capped mountain emerges through the misty distance. The scene then shifts focus toward the terrain ahead, moving steadily toward a large rock outcropping that rises from the black sand.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a desolate volcanic beach that gradually shifts into a rugged inland boulder field. It begins with the character walking forward along the shoreline, passing small bioluminescent orange flowers under an overcast sky where floating BTs linger. As the character progresses, the camera turns left away from the ocean, causing the coastline to disappear from view. The scene then shifts toward a more uneven terrain, with the snow-capped mountain moving to the left side of the frame. Finally, the movement weaves through a dense field of large black volcanic boulders as the landscape becomes increasingly rugged.
